title: Project Manager
description:
Toppan Next Tech is accelerating the growth of its Security Solutions & Services (SSS) Division to strengthen its competitive edge and capitalize on high-impact emerging opportunities. Leveraging state-of-the-art multi-modal biometrics and advanced AI technologies, we are driving innovation across a range of next-generation solutions, including:

  • Robotics and Automation Solutions

  • Personnel Access Control Systems

  • Vehicle Access Control Systems

  • Automated Border Control Systems

The successful candidate will join our dedicated team to help grow our portfolio and customer base, with ample opportunities to grow your career.  The candidate will report to the Project Management Office (PMO). Being resourceful and exhibiting a high degree of flexibility in managing projects are key attributes to be successful in the role. 

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Provide leadership in the project team so that the team can work towards a common goal so that we can deliver the projects on time and within budget

  • Formulate strategies with the project team to engage the customers and partners to achieve win-win outcomes

  • Coach and manage team leads / managers so that they can perform their tasks better as a united team

  • Plan and manage project delivery, including resource coordination, both internally and from external 3rd party vendors

  • Manage changes and risks in project by mitigating or eliminating them

  • Manage relationships with customers and 3rd party vendors involved in project delivery

  • Provide project status reports to customers and internal management at regular intervals (usually monthly) during project implementation

  • Monitor project performance and identify areas of improvement

PRE-REQUISITES

  • Bachelor Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent

  • Good supervisory, planning and management skills

  • Good inter-personal, verbal and written communications skills

  • At least ten (10) years of working experience, of which a minimum of five (5) years of project management experience in the development and implementation of large-scale turnkey projects

  • A proven track record of having successfully provided implementation and/or consultancy services for at least one project within the last five (5) years

  • At least 2 years of experience in the role as a Senior Project Manager / Project Director, or similar capacity

  • Project Management Professional (PMP) or equivalent certification will be preferred

  • Scrum Master certification or experience with running agile projects will be preferred

  • Experience in government IT projects or with civil works involvement will be advantageous

postedCompany.description:
In a world of increasing connectivity and digital interactions, safeguarding identity and payment credentials has become that much more challenging. This is especially relevant in Asia with unique virtual and physical cultural interactions. Based in Singapore with a strong regional focus in Asia, TOPPAN NEXT TECH brings together three of our innovative business units to deliver end-to-end digital & print for enterprise security & identity needs.


For over 30 years, we’ve partnered with clients facing ongoing security risks to safeguard their operations and reputation in cost-effective ways to process and manage business documents. We’re trusted by governments and financial institutions to produce advanced secure documents for them.


Our security print services include passports, visa labels, certificates, confidential documents, cheques, vouchers, custom & excise stamps, tax revenue stamps, savings books, lottery tickets and machine-readable betting slips. We also offer design and consultancy services (including counterfeit analysis) with constant research into the latest tracking and tracing technologies.


Our publication services include, design, pre-press, high-quality printing, binding, packaging, shipping, logistical support and final distribution.


Our digital print services include data printing, mailing and fulfilment, electronic archiving, image management solutions, database design and management, and data capture and processing.
postedCompany.name: Toppan Next Tech PTE. LTD.
